sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40205" key="e)pimhku/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμηκύνω</orth>, <sense id="n40205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lengthen, prolong</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μάχην</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:10:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.10.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
